texto: I shall tell you what I believe. I believe God is a librarian. I believe that literature is holy...it is that best part of our souls that we break off and give each other, and God has a special dispensation for it, angels to guard its making and its preservation.
explicacao: Citação de Sarah Smith sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I shall tell you what I believe. I believe God is a librarian. I believe that literature is holy.…” articula reflexao, literature, power-of-words em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como power-of-words.
